title: Toolshot
description: Screenshot Tooltips just like they look in game!
body:
# Toolshot
A simple Minecraft utility mod providing the ability to export any Minecraft Tooltip as a PNG image via a keybinding you have to set in the in-game settings, just like they are seen in game! This means, Resource Packs modifying the games looks are natively supported.

<details>
<summary>Image</summary>

![Image showing a tooltip, displaying the native texturepack support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/842430bb84687cbd436f062656b7e874a0faf868.png)

</details>

Scaling the exported PNGs is natively supported via the config. You can open it by installing Mod Menu and modifying the scale factor!

This mod was heavily inspired by [ChatShot](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatshot), a mod by [DeDiamondPro](https://modrinth.com/user/DeDiamondPro)

Icon made by [Juna](https://github.com/j10a1n15)
